purpose: Archive the intended scan semantics and future lint boundary while no executable tooling exists.
instruction: scan discovers all files that match the governed filename rules and runtime scan assets
scan applies a disallowed list to exclude blacklisted domains such as Octopus_OS
scan supports both stdout output and json output
when json output is requested, the result file must be written under the corresponding Codex_Skill_Runtime folder
workflow: load filename rules and keyword rules from external scan rule assets
walk the workspace using those managed match rules
exclude all paths that match the disallowed list
produce a managed target list for human review
run structure lint against every discovered managed file
rules: do not invent an executable scan command during the no-tool phase
scan semantics remain archival until new tooling is rebuilt
if a discovered managed filename has no matching structure template, future tooling must stop with an error
AGENTS.md currently requires AGENTS_content_structure.md as its governing structure template
